features.name: readmemh initialization of 2D unpacked array RAM with width mismatch
features.description: Code should include a $readmemh call that initializes a unpacked array RAM where the hex file contains byte-oriented data but the RAM width is greater than 8 bits, causing data corruption

features.name: BRAM generate block with conditional initialization based on parameter
features.description: Code should include a generate block that conditionally uses $readmemh versus a for-loop initialization based on a string parameter comparison

features.name: BRAM read operation with WE and RE both asserted handling
features.description: Code should include a BRAM read logic that handles simultaneous WE and RE signals, outputting X when both are high
features.snippet:
if (RE) begin
  if (WE) begin
    DO <= {DATA_WIDTH{1'hx}};
  end else begin
    DO <= RAM[ADDR];
  end
end
